description_long: This is a transparent cylindrical plastic bottle with a white spray nozzle and a screw-on cap. The bottle features a red label wrapped around its midsection, displaying a white medical cross and text in white and black. The label includes a gradient background and some placeholder text, with the most prominent words reading 'best hand sanitiser EVER.' The bottle appears to be partially filled with a clear liquid, visible through the transparent body. The spray mechanism is typical for dispensing fine mists, and the overall design is compact and portable. The object is likely intended for personal hygiene use in public or urban environments.
description: A clear plastic spray bottle with a red label and white cap, featuring a medical cross and text. The bottle is compact, portable, and partially filled with liquid.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red label with the white cross and the main product text clearly visible.
description_view_1: Angled view revealing more of the label's side text and the curvature of the bottle.
description_view_2: Rear view with the label's back mostly visible and minimal text or graphics.
description_view_3: Side view showing the edge of the label and a partial glimpse of the front text.
